original: -10% to amount of Suppressed Spell Damage Prevented
The Oppressor.replacement: (10-15)% chance to Avoid All Damage from Hits (No chance to avoid damage can be higher than 75%)

original: You take 20% of Damage from Blocked Hits

The Pandemonius.replacement: (5-15)% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Cold Damage

The Perfect Form.replacement: +8 to Evasion Rating per 10 Player Maximum Life

Ghost Dance (Cannot Recover Energy Shield to above Evasion Rating. Every 2 seconds, gain a Ghost Shroud, up to a maximum of 3. When Hit, lose a Ghost Shroud to Recover Energy Shield equal to 3% of your Evasion Rating)

original: Adds 3 to 5 Physical Damage to Attacks with this Weapon per 3 Player Levels
The Poet's Pen.replacement: Adds 3 to 5 Physical Damage to Spells per 3 Player Levels

original: Gain (6-10)% of Fire Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
The Red Dream.replacement: +4% to Chaos Resistance per Endurance Charge

original: Gain (6-10)% of Fire Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
The Red Nightmare.replacement: +4% to Chaos Resistance per Endurance Charge

original: Gain (6-10)% of Fire Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
The Red Nightmare.replacement: Fire Damage with Hits is Lucky if you've Blocked an Attack Recently (Recently refers to the past 4 seconds)

original: Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant Chance to Block Attack Damage at 50% of its value
The Red Nightmare.replacement: Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radiusalso grant Fire Damage Converted to Chaos Damage at 100% of its value

original: 10% additional Physical Damage Reduction while stationary
The Red Trail.replacement: Gain an Endurance Charge every 1 seconds while Stationary

original: Gain a Frenzy Charge on Hit while Bleeding
The Red Trail.replacement: Gain a Power Charge on Hit while Bleeding

The Searing Touch.replacement: +(3-5) to maximum number of Summoned Searing Bond Totems

The Snowblind Grace.replacement: +6 to Evasion Rating per 10 Player Maximum Life
Purity of Ice has no Reservation

original: +(5-8)% to Quality of Socketed Support Gems

The Squire.replacement: Ignore Attribute Requirements of Socketed Gems (Attributes are Strength, Dexterity, and Intelligence)

The Surrender.replacement: +3% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage (Maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage cannot be raised above 90%)
Gain (300-650) Energy Shield when you Block

original: Your Cold Damage can Ignite but not Freeze or Chill
Your Fire Damage can Shock but not Ignite
The Three Dragons.replacement: Your Chaos Damage can Shock (Shock increases Damage taken by up to 50%, depending on the amount of Lightning Damage in the hit, for 2 seconds)

original: Your Lightning Damage can Freeze but not Shock
The Three Dragons.replacement: Your Chaos Damage can Freeze (Freeze lowers Enemy Action Speed to zero, preventing them from acting. Duration is based on the Cold Damage of the Hit)

The Whispering Ice.replacement: 1% increased Area of Effect per 20 Intelligence

original: 50% reduced Effect of Curses on you
Thief's Torment.replacement: 50% reduced Effect of Non-Damaging Ailments on you (Ailments that do not deal Damage are Scorched, Chilled, Frozen, Brittle, Shocked, and Sapped)

Thunderfist.replacement: Herald of Thunder has 100% increased Buff Effect

Timeclasp.replacement: Debuffs on you expire (-20-20)% slower (Effects cannot be slowed below 25% of their normal expiry rate)

original: 15% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge when your Trap is triggered by an Enemy
Tinkerskin.replacement: Skills which Throw Traps have +2 Cooldown Uses

original: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Blastchain Mine
Tremor Rod.replacement: (60-100)% increased Effect of Auras from Mines

original: Adds (120-140) to (150-170) Cold Damage to Spells
Tulborn.replacement: +(2-3) to Level of all Cold Spell Skill Gems

original: Gain a Power Charge on Killing a Frozen Enemy
Tulborn.replacement: Gain a Power Charge after Spending a total of 200 Mana

original: Adds 50 to 70 Cold Damage to Spells per Power Charge
Tulfall.replacement: +(15-20)% to Cold Damage over Time Multiplier per Power Charge

original: Flasks do not apply to you

United in Dream.replacement: Minions have 25% chance to gain Unholy Might for 4 seconds on Kill (Unholy Might grants 100% of Physical Damage converted to Chaos Damage and 25% chance to apply Withered on Hit)

original: Minions Recover 10% of Life on Killing a Poisoned Enemy
United in Dream.replacement: +(20-30)% to Quality of all Minion Skill Gems

original: Allocated Small Passive Skills in Radius grant nothing
Unnatural Instinct.replacement: Allocated Notable Passive Skills in Radius grant nothing

original: +(700-1000) to maximum Life if there are no Life Modifiers on other Equipped Items
Utula's Hunger.replacement: +(1200-1800) to maximum Energy Shield if there are no Defence Modifiers on other Equipped Items (Flasks and Jewels are not Equipped)

original: 25% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
Uul-Netol's Embrace.replacement: Bleeding you inflict deals Damage (20-40)% faster (They will deal the same total damage over a shorter duration)

original: Curse Enemies with Vulnerability on Hit
You gain Onslaught for 20 seconds on using a Vaal Skill
Vaal Caress.replacement: You gain Adrenaline for 3 seconds on using a Vaal Skill (Adrenaline grants 100% increased Damage, 25% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed and 10% additional Physical Damage Reduction. You cannot gain Adrenaline if you already have it)

Ventor's Gamble.replacement: +(0-60) to maximum Energy Shield+(0-60) to maximum Mana

original: You cannot be Shocked while at maximum Endurance Charges
Veruso's Battering Rams.replacement: Cannot be Ignited while at maximum Endurance Charges

original: (20-40)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
Victario's Influence.replacement: Non-Curse Aura Skills have (40-80)% increased Duration

original: Minions gain (15-20)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Vis Mortis.replacement: Minions have Unholy Might (Unholy Might grants 100% of Physical Damage converted to Chaos Damage and 25% chance to apply Withered on Hit)

Voice of the Storm.replacement: +3% to maximum Lightning Resistance (Maximum Resistances cannot be raised above 90%)

original: Lightning Damage with Non-Critical Strikes is Lucky
Voice of the Storm.replacement: Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky (Unlucky things are rolled twice and the worst result used)

Void Battery.replacement: 3% increased Area of Effect per Power Charge

Voidbringer.replacement: (10-15)% increased Chaos Damage for each Corrupted Item Equipped (Flasks and Jewels are not Equipped)

Voll's Devotion.replacement: Lose all Power Charges on reaching Maximum Power Charges
Gain a Power Charge every Second if you haven't lost Power Charges Recently

original: (8-12)% increased Maximum Life if no Equipped Items are Corrupted
Voll's Vision.replacement: Gain (8-12)% of Maximum Life as Extra Maximum Energy Shield if no Equipped Items are Corrupted

original: Regenerate 400 Life per second if no Equipped Items are Corrupted
Voll's Vision.replacement: (15-20)% of Life Regeneration also applies to Energy Shield if no Equipped Items are Corrupted

original: 50% increased Area of Effect of Hex Skills

Witchbane.replacement: Curse Skills have (10-15)% increased Skill Effect Duration

original: When you Kill an Enemy Cursed with a Non-Aura Hex, become Immune to
Witchbane.replacement: Cursed Enemies you or your Minions Kill have a (10-15)% chance to Explode, dealing a quarter of their maximum Life as Chaos Damage

original: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 5 Concentrated Effect
Wyrmsign.replacement: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 5 Manaforged Arrows

Xoph's Blood.replacement: (5-15)% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage

Elemental Overload (Skills that have dealt a Critical Strike in the past 8 seconds deal 40% more Elemental Damage with Hits and Ailments. Your Critical Strikes do not deal extra Damage. Ailments never count as being from Critical Strikes)

Xoph's Heart.replacement: (5-15)% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage

original: Nearby Enemies are Covered in Ash
Xoph's Heart.replacement: Nearby Enemies are Debilitated (Enemies that are Debilitated have 20% less Movement Speed and deal 10% less damage)

original: Gain 20% of Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Xoph's Inception.replacement: Ignites you inflict deal Damage (20-40)% faster (They will deal the same total damage over a shorter duration)
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Returning Projectiles

original: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Ignite Proliferation
Xoph's Nurture.replacement: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 30 Immolate

original: Trigger Level 10 Shock Ground when Hit
Ylfeban's Trickery.replacement: Increases and Reductions to Spell Damage also apply to Attack Damage with Retaliation Skills at 200% of their value

Zahndethus' Cassock.replacement: Create Profane Ground instead of Consecrated Ground (Hits against Enemies on Profane Ground have 100% increased Critical Strike Chance, and Curses have 10% increased Effect on them)
